pi_items.source: JEDEC standards documentation: JEP95 'Registered and Standard Outlines for Solid State and Related Products' contains transistor outlines (TO) including TO-220. JESD77 is 'Terms, Definitions, and Letter Symbols for Discrete Semiconductor and Optoelectronic Devices', not package outlines.

privileged_info_summary: The TO-220 JEDEC standard dimensions claimed in the task (15.9mm × 10.15mm mounting surface) are slightly inaccurate. Verified measurements show the TO-220 body size including metal tab is 15.7mm × 9.9mm according to eesemi.com reference documentation. The claimed mounting hole diameter of 3.5mm is within the practical range but official JEDEC specifications cite 0.150 inches (3.81mm) for pin holes, with metal tab mounting holes varying from 3.2-4.0mm in practice. The reference to 'JESD77-B' for TO-220 outline specification is incorrect; the proper standard is JEDEC Publication 95 (JEP95), which contains transistor outline drawings. JESD77 addresses terms and definitions, not package outlines. Aluminum 6061-T6 thermal conductivity of 167 W/m·K is verified as correct. Design requirements (8 minimum fins, 4 spreadsheet parameters, 2 mounting holes) are reasonable and verifiable specifications.
